repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: eta=0 independent-shock LP/SVAR support-function inclusion and common-restriction boundary; parent exempt

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP/VAR common-identifying-restriction equivalence, including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond exempt parent; API PartialID catalogue has only Manski bounded-outcome entries

published_prior_art.cite: LanneLiuLuoto2026 gives dependent-shock non-Gaussian identification under co-moment restrictions, but not an LP/sign versus higher-cumulant support-function critical leakage radius

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 had an eta=0 two-shock witness; parent exempt, and reflected O(2) plus leakage residual formula is new

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021 gives higher-moment rank conditions and AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018 gives sign/zero rotation algorithms; neither computes eta_w^*(P) at the LP support angle

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal strictly widens the parent eta=0 independent-shock cumulant-diagonalization premise to eta-bounded off-diagonal co-kurtosis leakage and gives a concrete eta=0 parent reduction.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Assumption regular-frontier with primitive observable rank or transversality inequalities for the semialgebraic contact program.
Add a boundary corollary isolating eta_w^*(P)=0 versus eta_w^*(P)>0 in terms of pure-diagonal contact at exposed LP maximizers.
State an optional inference-facing corollary mapping eta_w^*(P) into a Hoesch-Lee-Mesters-style weak-non-Gaussianity null.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and Conjecture 2 as the finite-dimensional audit case.
